bb_exchange_rates.selector: section.content table:first-of-type (USD/BDT bid/ask/WAR) + table:nth-of-type(2) (cross rates: EUR, GBP, AUD, JPY, CAD, SEK, SGD, CNH, INR, LKR)
bb_exchange_rates.notes: robots.txt unreachable during audit (CAPTCHA on all HTTP fetches). Page loads via Playwright: data IS present in DOM after JS execution. Table 0 has USD bid/ask/WAR (no distinct mid — WAR ≈ mid), Table 1 has EUR/GBP cross rates. Form #search-form POSTs to same URL with a datepicker date field (class: datepicker-here) to query historical data; current-day data loads without form submission. No stable id/class on tables — selector must use section.content table:nth-of-type(1) and section.content table:nth-of-type(2). Playwright required because plain HTTP GET returns CAPTCHA page.

bb_forex_reserves.notes: robots.txt unreachable during audit (CAPTCHA on HTTP). Page loads cleanly via Playwright. Table id='sortableTable' contains Period / Gross / BPM6 columns in million USD. Latest data: March 2026 = 34116.6m gross, 29501.2m BPM6. Updated monthly. Import cover months NOT present on this page — not published here. Form POSTs period=monthly|yearly to same URL; default page load already shows monthly series. Playwright required.

dse_market_summary.selector: table > tbody > tr > td > code (plain-text preformatted block inside first <code> element)
dse_market_summary.notes: robots.txt returned 404. DSE terms page at /terms-of-use.php and /terms_condition.php both returned 404 — no ToS located during audit; flagged as warn (not blocker). Data is fully static HTML: a <code> element inside a <table><tbody><tr><td> contains preformatted plaintext with all market stats. DSEX/DS30/DSES index values are on the homepage (dse.com.bd/) as static HTML (confirmed: DSEX 5232.49, DSES 1059.70, DS30 1980.01). The market-statistics.php page holds advancing/declining/unchanged + trades + turnover. Turnover on page is in Tk (not crore) — 8247602308.40 Tk = 824.76 crore approx. Index values come from homepage, not market-statistics.php. Recommend scraping homepage for index levels + market-statistics.php for advancers/decliners. No JS rendering needed — requests + BeautifulSoup sufficient.

commodity_prices.notes: yfinance is unofficial but free, widely used, and requires no API key. Alpha Vantage free tier (25 calls/day) is an alternative but adds key-management overhead and a tighter rate limit. Palm oil (FCPO.KL) was excluded 2026-04-30 — Yahoo Finance returns 404 for the symbol and Bursa Malaysia data is no longer accessible via yfinance. Fallback = Alpha Vantage commodities endpoint if yfinance access degrades.
